news.t: Sustainable Investing: 4 Earth Day ETFs targeting clean water, wind, the smart grid — and one that has them all
Water Investing: 5 Funds You Should Tap

holdings.infoBox: FIW is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Waters stock at 4.89%, Agilent Technologies at 4.63%, Mueller Industries at 4.36%, Roper Technologies at 4.13%, and American Water Works Company at 3.97%.

overview.description: The First Trust Water ETF (FIW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ISE Clean Edge Water index. The fund tracks an index of the 36 largest US-listed water companies, weighted equally within five tiers. FIW was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
